forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: No worries, we'll send you reset instructions.

setNewPassword.title: Reset your password

table.empty: No down checks in this time range

advanced.description: Optional settings for advanced use cases

jsonPath.description: This expression will be evaluated against the response JSON data and the result will be used to match against the expected value. See <jmesLink>jmespath.org</jmesLink> for query language documentation.
jsonPath.label: JSONPath expression

advanced.title: Advanced settings

frequency.description: How often do you want to check the status of this monitor?
frequency.title: Check frequency

grpcServiceName.label: Service name
grpcServiceName.placeholder: e.g. my.service.v1 (leave empty for overall health)

description.http: Enter the URL or IP to monitor (e.g., https://example.com/ or 192.168.1.100) and add a clear display name that appears on the dashboard.
description.ping: Enter the IP address or hostname to ping (e.g., 192.168.1.100 or example.com) and add a clear display name that appears on the dashboard.
description.port: Enter the URL or IP of the server, the port number and a clear display name that appears on the dashboard.
description.docker: Enter the Docker container name or ID. You can use either the container name (e.g., my-app) or the container ID (full 64-char ID or short ID).
description.game: Enter the IP address or hostname and the port number to ping (e.g., 192.168.1.100 or example.com) and choose game type.
description.pagespeed: Track page load performance, Core Web Vitals, and optimization scores for your website.
description.grpc: Enter the hostname and port of the gRPC server, optionally specify a service name for the health check, and add a display name.
description.websocket: Enter the WebSocket URL to monitor (e.g., wss://example.com/socket) and add a display name.
description.hardware: Monitor CPU, memory, disk usage, and temperature for your infrastructure.

ignoreTls.description: Configure TLS/SSL certificate validation for HTTPS connections.
ignoreTls.title: TLS/SSL settings

incidents.description: A sliding window is used to determine when a monitor goes down. The status of a monitor will only change when the percentage of checks in the sliding window meet the specified value.

checks.label: Number of checks in sliding window

percentage.label: What percentage of checks in the sliding window fail/succeed before monitor status changes?

incidents.title: Incidents

notifications.description: Select the notification channels you want to use
notifications.title: Notifications

type.description: Select the type of check to perform
type.optionDockerDescription: Use Docker to monitor if a container is running.
type.optionGameDescription: Monitor if a specific game server is online.
type.optionGrpcDescription: Monitor gRPC services using the standard Health Checking Protocol.
type.optionWebSocketDescription: Monitor WebSocket endpoints for connection health and response time.
type.optionHttpDescription: Use HTTP(S) to monitor your website or API endpoint.
type.optionPingDescription: Use ICMP Ping to monitor if a server is online.
type.optionPortDescription: Monitor if a specific port on a server is open.
type.title: Type

thresholds.title: Alert thresholds
thresholds.description: Define the thresholds at which alerts should be triggered for this hardware monitor.

geoChecks.title: Geo-Distributed Checks
geoChecks.description: Run checks from multiple geographic locations to monitor global availability and performance.

url.title: Monitor IP/URL on Status Page
url.description: Display the IP address or URL of monitor on the public Status page. If it's disabled, only the monitor name will be shown to protect sensitive information.

stats.title: Monitor history
stats.description: Clear all monitoring history and statistics for your team. This action is irreversible.

dialog.title: Clear all monitoring history?
dialog.description: This will permanently delete all monitoring history, statistics, and check data for your team. This action cannot be undone.

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Assign roles to the user. Multiple roles can be selected.

removeUser.title: Remove user
removeUser.content: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from your team? This action cannot be undone.

comment.label: Comment (optional)
comment.placeholder: Add a comment about the resolution...

monitors.description: Monitors that the maintenance window should apply to

timezone.description: Select the timezone used to display dates and times throughout the application.

ui.title: Appearance
ui.description: Switch between light and dark mode, change language, or customize chart display type.

pagespeed.description: Enter your Google PageSpeed API key to enable Google PageSpeed monitoring. Click Reset to update the key.

apiKey.label: PageSpeed API key
apiKey.labelSet: API key is set. Click Reset to change it.
apiKey.placeholder: Enter your Google PageSpeed API key

url.title: Monitor IP/URL on Status Page
url.description: Display the IP address or URL of monitor on the public Status page. If it's disabled, only the monitor name will be shown to protect sensitive information.

stats.title: Monitor history
stats.description: Clear all monitoring history and statistics for your team. This action is irreversible.

clear.label: Clear all stats. This is irreversible.

retention.title: Check retention
retention.description: Set how long check data is retained before being automatically cleaned up.

thresholds.title: Global Thresholds
thresholds.description: Set global CPU, Memory, Disk, and Temperature thresholds for infrastructure monitoring. These apply to all hardware monitors unless overridden.

email.title: Email settings
email.description: Configure the email settings for your system. This is used to send notifications and alerts.
email.descriptionTransport: This builds an SMTP transport for NodeMailer

host.label: Email host - Hostname or IP address to connect to

port.label: Email port - Port to connect to

user.label: Email user - Username for authentication, overrides email address if specified

password.label: Email password - Password for authentication
password.labelSet: Password is set. Click Reset to change it.

tlsServername.label: TLS Servername - Optional Hostname for TLS Validation when host is an IP

connectionHost.label: Email connection host - Hostname to use in the HELO/EHLO greeting

secure.label: Use SSL (recommended): Encrypt the connection using SSL/TLS

pool.label: Enable connection pooling: Reuse existing connections to improve performance

ignoreTLS.label: Disable STARTTLS: Don't use TLS even if the server supports it

requireTLS.label: Force STARTTLS: Require TLS upgrade, fail if not supported

rejectUnauthorized.label: Reject invalid certificates: Reject connections with self-signed or untrusted certificates

demoMonitors.description: Add sample monitors for demonstration purposes.

removeMonitors.description: Remove all monitors from your system.

importExportMonitors.title: Import / Export monitors
importExportMonitors.description: Import or export your monitors data as a JSON file for backup or transfer.
